target: 5. Searching for a Hiding Place
(We should be okay if we've made it this far...)
Hey Shin-chan! Was what you said earlier really true!?
Did Dad... really turn into a Shadow?
Even though we were just talking to him, and I couldn't think of him as anyone but Dad.
Shadows can copy a person's appearance.
That human-shaped black stain is undoubtedly the mark left behind when a Shadow copies a person and erases them.
And... the only person in that house who could have been copied is Alain.
...No way.
(Alain…)
…Mio, can you move?
Anyway, let's head to the port. The ferry might already be there.
Yeah…
Tokiko and Sou-kun might have come to the port too.
No, they definitely must be here!
Yeah, let's go!
The ferry… isn't here.
Not just the ferry, there isn't a single person here either...
Tokiko... Sou-kun...
(I really doubt all the survivors could have fit on the ferry that left before this.)
(And yet...)
Oh, right! They might be hiding somewhere until the ferry comes!
We'd stand out if we stayed here.
(It's no good... Bad thoughts keep crossing my mind no matter what.)
Shin-chan?
You're right, Mio. Staying in such a conspicuous place is basically asking to be attacked.
We should hide ourselves too, until it's time for the ferry.
Yeah.
A place as far from the shrine as possible, that isn't a residential house, where we can hide right now...
How about the lighthouse?
That's way too far.
Hmmm, then the school?
I see, the school!
(There shouldn't be anyone at the school right now. And there are plenty of places to hide!)
Alright, it's decided then. Let's go.
Hey, Shin-chan. Can you try calling Tokiko?
I want to call her myself, but before I knew it, my battery had died.
Ah, got it.
Is it still not connecting?
Yeah... No matter how many times I call, it won't connect.
I'm trying to call Sou too, not just Toki-chan, but...
No good. He's not answering either.
Maybe both of their phones ran out of battery too.
Oh, do you think maybe they went back home? They could charge their phones that way.
I see, that is a possibility.
(We went back home once too. Sou and the others might have thought to do the same.)
(Should we head to the school as planned? Or to Sou's house...)
Head to Hishigata Clinic
Head to the school
Good point. Let's go check Hishigata Clinic.
…No response.
But the lights are on.
Hey, Mio. Did Hishigata-sensei go to the festival?
I don't think he did. Since he's the only doctor on the island, it seems he's quite busy.
Yeah, makes sense...
(And yet, there's no response even when we ring the doorbell...)
(He might have been turned into a Shadow, just like Alain.)
(And I can't deny the possibility that Sou and the others might have returned to a place like this...)
(No, if Hishigata-sensei's Shadow is here, wouldn't it come out? And then skillfully trick us with words...)
(...This is bad. The more I think about it, the more my thoughts head in a bad direction.)
Shin-chan, what should we do?
It's a shame, but let's give up on this place and head to the school.
Yeah, I understand.

No, let's not.
Let's go to the school as planned.
Since we have no proof that those two returned home, it would mean taking a risk. I want to avoid that at least.
I see…
I understand. Then let's hurry to the school.
Sorry, Mio.
No, it's fine. I know you're holding back even though you're worried about Sou-kun too, Shin-chan.
I see…
Oh right, I should email Sou and tell him we're heading to the school.
"Mio and I are heading to the school now. If we can't meet up, let's leave the island on the final ferry."
(Sou... I hope he replies, but...)
